about.title: Learning, redesigned around how people actually learn
about.subtitle: DextaLearning turns decades of learning science into a platform where finishing — and remembering — is the default.
about.mission_body: To make deep, lasting learning the default, not the exception — for every educator, in every classroom.

science.title: Science over hype
science.body: Every feature traces back to evidence on how memory and motivation actually work.

finish.title: Finishing matters
finish.body: Starting is easy. We design for the harder, more valuable part — finishing.

access.title: Built for everyone
access.body: Mobile-first, multilingual, and low-bandwidth — learning that meets people where they are.

about.cta_body: Start free and see what learning the right way feels like.

community.title: You learn faster when you're not alone
community.subtitle: Cohorts, groups, and a community of educators growing together.

cohorts.title: Join a cohort
cohorts.body: Learn alongside peers with a facilitator and a shared deadline.

groups.title: Find your group
groups.body: Small peer groups keep you accountable and motivated.

share.title: Share your story
share.body: Inspire others with how learning changed your teaching.

community.cta_body: Create a free account and find your people.

blog.title: The DextaLearning Blog
blog.subtitle: Notes on learning science, teaching, and building DextaLearning.
blog.not_found_body: This article may have moved or is no longer available.
